refined_caption: The hospital food appears to be contaminated and unhygienic. Visible signs of contamination are present on the food.
complaint_description: I was served contaminated food during my stay at the hospital, which is unacceptable. The food had visible signs of contamination and I'm worried about my health. I hope the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: The food they served me at the hospital was disgusting, it was contaminated and I could see it, I'm really worried about getting sick from it.
